events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes cable tray work that is rough-complete, with the defect that cable is not secured on vertical runs. This is a non-compliance issue under NEC Art. 392. The work is roughly 70% complete until defects are corrected.

Let me assess:
- Decision: fail (non-compliant, cables not secured on vertical runs)
- Risk: medium (unsecured cables on vertical runs can fall/damage)
- Work stage: rough-complete
- Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
- Percent complete: 70
- Findings: cables not secured on vertical runs
- Actions: secure cables on vertical runs per NEC 392
- References: NEC Art. 392
